title: message_get ids=null returns only default channel
description: Message/get with ids=null is specified in RFC 8620 as returning all objects. The implementation returns only the first 256 messages from the default channel (state.default_channel_id). Messages in other chats are silently invisible. A client calling Message/get with ids=null after creating a DM chat will never see those messages. The constraint should either be documented in the Session object capabilities (e.g. maxObjectsInGet per chat), or Message/get should accept an optional chatId filter and apply it.
